ModuleName: 7 - Object-Oriented Programming and AI-Assisted Coding Workflow

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's learning topics across four areas — OOP fundamentals (classes, instances, attributes), modeling engineering objects (Beam and Sensor classes), inheritance and subclasses, and AI-assisted coding tools — serving as a roadmap for learners and instructors to navigate the module's scope and sequence.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: This page lists and briefly describes the major topics covered in Module 7, including OOP fundamentals (classes, objects, attributes, and methods) and AI-assisted coding workflows, giving learners and instructors an overview of what the module covers before diving into individual lessons.
